error: templates/cb_step_18_pre.py.tpl: Syntax error: unexpected indent (<unknown>, line 2); Syntax error in generated code; templates/cb_step_18_post.py.tpl: Syntax error: unexpected indent (<unknown>, line 2); Syntax error in generated code; Post-template references '_bonereconstructionplanner_cb_step_18_id' but pre-template does not assign it; templates/cb_step_21.py.tpl: Template references parameter role 'fibulaLine' with node class vtkMRMLMarkupsCurveNode but metadata expects vtkMRMLMarkupsLineNode; templates/cb_step_22.py.tpl: Undefined variable: 'param'; Undefined variable: 'param'; Undefined variable: 'value'
fix: Fixed syntax errors in cb_step_18_pre.py.tpl and cb_step_18_post.py.tpl by rewriting multi-line comments as single lines to avoid indentation issues. Ensured _bonereconstructionplanner_cb_step_18_id is assigned in the pre-template. Fixed cb_step_21.py.tpl by changing node class search from vtkMRMLMarkupsCurveNode to vtkMRMLMarkupsLineNode to match the extension's addFibulaLine() output. Fixed cb_step_22.py.tpl by replacing the manual parameter loop with a call to logic.setDefaultParameters(parameterNode) to avoid undefined variable issues and simplify the code.
